Step 4 — Headless Button

Identical markup. Two brands. Every property flows from [data-brand] → CSS variables → component. No colour, radius, or size is hardcoded in button.css.

Brand A — Blue Rounded

  • --action-primary-bg → #2563EB
  • --action-primary-radius → 8px
  • --action-primary-shadow → sm

Brand B — Black Sharp

  • --action-primary-bg → #111827
  • --action-primary-radius → 0px
  • --action-primary-shadow → none
